name: Ty2_LTR_family
description: Ty2 retrotransposon family in S. cerevisiae. 5.9 kb element with 332 bp delta-like LTRs; closely related to Ty1 (>80% identity in some domains). S288C carries 13 full-length Ty2 plus ~30 solo LTRs. Like Ty1, integrates preferentially upstream of Pol III genes.

architecture.internal_structure: 5'LTR (332 bp) - gag-pol ORFs - 3'LTR; solo LTRs are recombination products of intra-element exchange

expected_copy_count: ~13 full-length elements + ~30 solo LTRs per haploid S288C genome; strain-variable
